scenes.title: Beach Setup
scenes.summary: Colonel Winnant observes engineers preparing a beach landing site.

characters.name: COLONEL WINNANT
characters.need: Accurate intelligence on tide and enemy presence.
characters.fear: Failure of the operation leading to loss of life.
characters.competing_desires: only one want visible — competing desire unclear
characters.arc_summary: Gains confidence in his judgment through the operation's success or failure.

planted_details.detail: Engineers preparing for a beach landing.

structure.central_conflict: Colonel vs natural elements and enemy forces.

turning_points.description: Colonel learns the tide is turning against them.

structure.biggest_issue: Unclear central conflict and dramatic question.
